sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n10984" key="a)nw/flion" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="full" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">ἀνώφλῑον</orth>, <gen lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="gen">τό</gen>, (<etym lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="etym">φλιά</etym>) <sense id="n10984.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">lintel</tr_> of a door, <bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <author TEIform="author">Suid.</author> </bibl> </sense> </entryFree>
